transcript.final_response:
# Test Summary

Total: 12 | Passed: 9 | Failed: 3

## Failures
- test_login_expired_token
- test_signup_duplicate_email
- test_session_timeout

Saved to: `/reports/test-summary.md`
tool_calls:
mkdir -p /reports
input=/data/test-results.txt
summary=/reports/test-summary.md

# Compute counts
read total passed failed <<EOF
$(awk 'BEGIN{t=0;p=0;f=0} /^(PASS|FAIL)[[:space:]]+/ {t++; if($1=="PASS") p++; else if($1=="FAIL") f++} END{print t, p, f}' "$input")
EOF

# Build summary file
{
  echo "# Test Summary"
  echo ""
  echo "Total: $total | Passed: $passed | Failed: $failed"
  echo ""
  echo "## Failures"
  awk '/^FAIL[[:space:]]+/ {print "- "$2}' "$input"
} > "$summary"

cat "$summary"

tool_outputs.stdout:
-rw-r--r--      313 2026-07-12 00:33 test-results.txt
---
PASS test_login_valid
PASS test_login_invalid_password
FAIL test_login_expired_token
PASS test_signup_new_user
FAIL test_signup_duplicate_email
PASS test_logout
PASS test_password_reset
FAIL test_session_timeout
PASS test_profile_update
PASS test_profile_delete
PASS test_api_rate_limit
PASS test_api_auth_header
